text: Select the three types of tables that exist within Snowflake. (Choose three.)
True or False: Snowpipe via REST API can only reference External Stages as source.
True or False: A third-party tool that supports standard JDBC or ODBC but has no Snowflake-specific driver will be unable to connect to Snowflake.
True or False: It is possible to load data into Snowflake without creating a named File Format object.
True or False: A table in Snowflake can only be queried using the Virtual Warehouse that was used to load the data.
Which of the following statements are true of Snowflake data loading? (Choose three.)

options.a: VARIANT null values are not the same as SQL NULL values
options.b: It is recommended to do frequent, single row DMLs
options.c: It is recommended to validate the data before loading into the Snowflake target table
options.d: It is recommended to use staging tables to manage MERGE statements

text: Which statements are true of micro-partitions? (Choose two.)

options.b: They are stored compressed only if COMPRESS=TRUE on Table
options.d: They are only encrypted in the Enterprise edition and above

text: True or False: Query ID's are unique across all Snowflake deployments and can be used in communication with Snowflake Support to help troubleshoot issues.
A deterministic query is run at 8am, takes 5 minutes, and the results are cached. Which of the following statements are true? (Choose two.)

options.a: The exact query will ALWAYS return the precomputed result set for the RESULT_CACHE_ACTIVE = time period
options.b: The same exact query will return the precomputed results if the underlying data hasn't changed and the results were last accessed within previous 24 hour period
options.c: The same exact query will return the precomputed results even if the underlying data has changed as long as the results were last accessed within the previous 24 hour period
options.d: The 24 hour timer on the precomputed results gets renewed every time the exact query is executed

Which statement best describes Snowflake tables?

options.a: Snowflake tables are logical representations of underlying physical data
options.b: Snowflake tables are the physical instantiation of data loaded into Snowflake
options.c: Snowflake tables require that clustering keys be defined to perform optimally
options.d: Snowflake tables are owned by a user

text: Which item in the Data Warehouse migration process does not apply in Snowflake?

Which of the following are main sections of the top navigation of the Snowflake Web Interface (UI)? (Choose three.)
What is the recommended Snowflake data type to store semi-structured data like JSON?
Which of the following statements are true of Snowflake releases: (Choose two.)

options.b: They roll up and release approximately monthly, but customers can request early release application
options.c: During a release, new customer requests/queries/connections transparently move over to the newer version
options.d: A customer is assigned a 30 minute window during which the system will be unavailable and customer is upgraded

text: Which of the following are many common use cases for zero-copy cloning? (Choose three.)

options.a: Quick provisioning of Dev and Test/QA environments

text: If a Small Warehouse is made up of 2 servers/cluster, how many servers/cluster make up a Medium Warehouse?

options.a: Is available to all Snowflake Editions
options.b: Is only available to customers with Business Critical Edition
options.c: Restricts or enables access to specific IP addresses
options.d: Is activated using an ALTER DATABASE command

text: True or False: Snowflake charges additional fees to Data Providers for each Share they create.
Query results are stored in the Result Cache for how long after they are last accessed, assuming no data changes have occurred?
A role is created and owns 2 tables. This role is then dropped. Who will now own the two tables?

options.b: The user that deleted the role
options.d: The assumed role that dropped the role

text: Which of the following connectors are available in the Downloads section of the Snowflake Web Interface (UI)? (Choose two.)
Which of the following DML commands isn't supported by Snowflake?
Which of the following statements is true of zero-copy cloning?

options.a: Zero-copy clones increase storage costs as cloning the table requires storing its data twice
options.b: All zero-copy clone objects inherit the privileges of their original objects
options.c: Zero-copy cloning is licensed as an additional Snowflake feature
options.d: At the instance/instant a clone is created, all micro-partitions in the original table and the clone are fully shared

text: True or False: When a user creates a role, they are initially assigned ownership of the role and they maintain ownership until it is transferred to another user.
The Query History in the Snowflake Web Interface (UI) is kept for approximately:
To run a Multi-Cluster Warehouse in auto-scale mode, a user would:

options.a: Configure the Maximum Clusters setting to Auto-Scale
options.b: Set the Warehouse type to Auto
options.c: Set the Minimum Clusters and Maximum Clusters settings to the same value
options.d: Set the Minimum Clusters and Maximum Clusters settings to the different values

options.c: The database the Virtual Warehouse resides in
options.d: The queries currently being run by the Virtual Warehouse
